title: Curating the Instruction Mix
concept: A balanced instruction dataset must include diverse tasks: coding, translation, summarization, brainstorming, and roleplay.

exercises.prompt: To make a virtual assistant smart and helpful with everything, what kind of training data does it need?

options.text: A diverse mix of different tasks

exercises.explain: An instruction dataset must have a mix of diverse tasks like coding, translation, and brainstorming so the AI can handle many types of human requests.

cards.title: Can an AI Do It All?
cards.body: If you only train an AI on math equations, it will freeze when you ask it to write a bedtime story. To make an AI helper that can do anything, we must feed it a perfectly balanced mix of different challenges!

cards.title: What is an Instruction Mix?
cards.body: An instruction mix is a carefully selected blend of different prompt types used to train an AI. It combines logical tasks (like coding), creative tasks (like brainstorming), and linguistic tasks (like translation) to make the AI versatile and helpful.

cards.title: The Buffet Analogy
cards.body: Imagine building a buffet. If you only serve pizza, your guests will miss out on vitamins. A great buffet needs salad, pasta, soup, and dessert. Similarly, an AI model needs a buffet of different tasks (coding, writing, translation) to become a well-rounded thinker.

cards.title: A Balanced Dataset in Action
cards.body:
A balanced dataset might contain:
• 20% Coding challenges to build logic.
• 25% Summarization tasks to learn brevity.
• 25% Creative writing and brainstorming.
• 15% Language translation exercises.
• 15% Roleplay to teach conversational tone.

cards.title: Myth: More Data is Always Better
cards.body: Many think that to make an AI good at everything, you just need a massive amount of any text. In reality, quantity doesn't beat variety. A smaller, well-curated dataset with diverse tasks makes a much smarter AI than a huge dataset of only one task.

cards.title: One-Track vs. Balanced Training
cards.body: Curating your dataset ensures your AI handles real-world requests smoothly, whereas a single-focus dataset limits its potential.

right.text: Prepares the AI for anything by balancing logic (code), language (translation), and creativity (writing).

left.text: Trains the AI to do only one thing well, like translating text, but leaves it useless for coding or writing.

exercises.prompt: What happens if you train an AI model ONLY on translation instructions?

options.text: It will struggle to write code or brainstorm creative ideas.
It will automatically become excellent at coding.
It will refuse to answer any questions at all.
It will learn how to write stories but forget translation.

exercises.explain: If an AI only practices translation, it will not develop the logical reasoning required to write code or the imagination needed to brainstorm ideas.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Including coding tasks in your dataset actually helps the AI improve its logical thinking on non-coding tasks.
exercises.explain: Different tasks train different neural pathways. Coding teaches logic, while creative writing teaches tone and imagination. Both are needed.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank to complete the rule for training a versatile AI.
exercises.sentence: To train a well-rounded AI assistant, developers must curate a diverse instruction ___ of tasks.
exercises.explain: A diverse mix of tasks ensures the AI learns both logic and creativity instead of getting stuck on one type of task.

exercises.prompt: Identify the dataset that represents a high-quality instruction mix for a general-purpose AI:

options.text: System B: A curated mix of 2,000 coding prompts, 2,000 translation prompts, and 2,000 roleplay prompts
System C: 10,000 random social media comments

exercises.explain: System B has a balanced, curated mix of coding, creative, and logic tasks. System A only has one task, and System C has messy, uncurated chat logs.

exercises.prompt: You are building a brand new virtual assistant that needs to help users write poems, debug python code, and translate Spanish. How should you design its training instruction mix?

options.text: Train it only on math problems so it becomes super smart
Only give it coding problems to make it a software engineer
Provide a curated mix of coding, brainstorming, translation, and roleplay
Give it millions of random unorganized internet comments

exercises.explain: To build a helpful general assistant, we must train the AI on a diverse mix of prompt types, including creative writing, logical coding, and structured formatting. Training only on one type makes the AI struggle with others.
